global_description: A small, compact bird with a rounded body and short tail. It features a predominantly olive-green and brown plumage with streaked patterns. The head is marked with a distinctive olive crown and pale eye ring. The wings and back display a mix of brown and black streaks, while the underparts are lighter with fine streaking.

part_details.head: Rounded with an olive-green crown and pale eye ring.
part_details.wings: Brown with black streaks, compact and rounded.
part_details.underparts: Lighter with fine streaking, blending into the sides.
part_details.back: Brown with black streaks, blending into wings.

spatial_relations: The olive crown sits atop the rounded head.
The pale eye ring encircles the eyes.
The wings are attached to the sides of the body, streaked with brown and black.
The short tail extends from the rear of the body.
